linkedin.text:
1,200 top performers. Three continents. One stage. Four days. Zero margin for error.

Here was the brief: fly them in, house them, feed them, award them, and stage a flagship gala that feels personal — at a scale most teams would call impossible.

So we built it as one accountable operation: 14 charter movements, 9 hotels, simultaneous translation in four languages, and a custom stage show, run by a single team that owned every handoff.

The outcome: 98% guest satisfaction and a renewed three-year contract. At Uproduction, that's what disciplined production looks like — from business to pleasure, without the seams showing.

If your 2026 incentive feels too complex to hand off, that's the moment to bring us in. DM us "STAGE" or book a call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventProduction

facebook.text:
1,200 guests, three continents, one stage — and it had to feel personal. 😅

The brief was huge: fly everyone in, house them across 9 hotels, run 14 charter movements, translate live in 4 languages, and stage a custom gala over four days. One accountable team. The result? 98% guest satisfaction and a renewed three-year contract.

That's Uproduction — from business to pleasure, at any scale.
